history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward at the bottom of the view. The cell directly ahead is open, but I can already see that the goal G is to the right side of the corridor. Turning right will orient me toward the open path that leads toward the goal while avoiding the lava cells below.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is visible to my upper-left, but the immediate safe progress is to turn left so I can head toward the open path instead of into the wall.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see a clear path of floor cells to the right, and the goal G is further ahead in that direction. Moving forward is safe right now, while turning is unnecessary.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
